title: DEVELOPMENT OF A HIGHLY SAVING TECHNOLOGY FOR PURIFYING NATURAL GAS FROM SULFUR-CONTAINING COMPOUNDS
author: Jumaev K.
license_note: Zenodo record metadata license field: cc-by-4.0
description: Ensuring the reliability of operation and production safety of oil and gas facilities in modern society is the most important task. Recently, interest has appeared in the use of reagent less methods to reduce corrosive activity and to change the rheological properties of transported water and water-oil mixtures, for example, the use of physical influences. In particular, processing of permanent and variable magnetic field of liquids transported through pipelines allows changing their corrosive and rheological properties.
steps_raw: Ensuring the reliability of operation and production safety of oil and gas facilities in modern society is the most important task. keywords: absorber, desorber, oil gases, gas separator, heat exchanger, air cooler, vortex.
